functions.name: onPublish
functions.description: This function handles the 'Entry Publish' webhook event from Contentful to update any pending Mux Asset data in Mux, based on entries in Contentful.

functions.name: getSignedUrlTokens
functions.description: This action returns signed JWT tokens for securing Mux video playback.

functions.name: muxProxy
functions.description: Generic proxy for Mux REST API calls. Accepts method, path, and optional body.
